name: batch_read
description: Read multiple files or line ranges in one call, with head/tail, line numbers, line counts, directory listing, or show-nonprintable whitespace inspection.

parameters.name: --include=GLOB
parameters.description: File name glob filter for --dir mode

parameters.name: --type=f|d
parameters.description: File type filter for --dir mode: f (file) or d (directory)

examples.expected: Lines 10-20, 30, and 40-50 of file.go with line numbers

cost_saving_rationale: Replaces multi-step cat/nl/sed/cat-A/od-c patterns with a single call, saving 2+ steps per file read operation.
